# renderware-ps2-archive-packet

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Target | renderware-ps2 |
| Status | planned |

## Public Notes

Build the RenderWare PS2 packet around public release-note metadata, SDK package records, version numbers, plugin names, and clean-room compatibility leads.

## Inputs

- PS2 Gold release notes
- SDK 3.10 metadata
- RenderWare lineage sources

## Outputs

- standalone archival packet
- artifact graph
- clean-room compatibility map

## Blocked By

- renderware-ps2-triage
